employeeForm.title: HR - New Employee
employeeForm.description: Tunisia-ready HR onboarding with employee, contract, payroll, CNSS, and IRPP setup in one flow.

steps.payrollDesc: CNSS, IRPP, payment, and bank data
steps.reviewDesc: Save the full Tunisia onboarding pack

hints.employeeStatus: System-managed. It becomes `Active` only when all required fields are completed. Otherwise it stays `Draft`.
hints.contractStatus: System-managed from contract completeness and contract end date.
hints.workingHours: Auto-filled from the selected default shift on a standard 5-day work week.
hints.cnssStatus: System-managed from social regime and CNSS number availability.
hints.taxStatus: System-managed from marital status and number of children.
hints.attendanceLeaveInit: Assign the default shift and initialize the employee leave policy before payroll starts.
hints.payrollComponentsInit: Assign recurring earnings or deductions like transport allowance, meal allowance, or fixed deductions.
hints.noComponents: No payroll components yet. Add at least one recurring component for a payroll-ready employee.
hints.foreignCompliance: These fields are especially relevant when the employee is not Tunisian. The Ministry of Employment has dedicated foreign-worker procedures and work authorization categories.
hints.mandatoryDocuments: Upload the minimum HR/payroll documents before finishing onboarding.

validation.cddRestrictedTitle: CDD is restricted under Tunisia's 2025 labor reform
validation.cddRestrictedDesc: Use `CDD` only for legally allowed exceptions such as replacement, temporary increase in activity, or seasonal work.

review.readyTitle: Ready to save the full HR package
review.readyDesc: This will create or update the employee record, the primary contract, the payroll profile, the CNSS profile when available, and the IRPP tax profile.

sidebar.title: Tunisia HR Coverage
sidebar.employeeMasterDesc: Identity, civil status, contacts, work organization.
sidebar.employmentContractDesc: Contract number, type, salary basis, hours, and probation.
sidebar.payrollAndTaxDesc: CNSS/CNRPS, IRPP family situation, bank transfer details, and exemptions.
sidebar.foreignWorkerDesc: Residence card and work permit tracking for non-Tunisian hires.

statusUpdates.onboardingCreated: Employee created with HR onboarding successfully
